articles.author: Hugh Leask
articles.title: European stocks set to slide further as oil prices stay above $100 a barrel - CNBC
articles.description: European stocks traded lower Friday as the conflict in the Middle East weighs over markets.
articles.content:
LONDON European stocks opened the week's final trading session in negative territory, as investors continued to weigh the ongoing conflict in the Middle East and its lasting impact on growth.
